metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing the cc-enslaver discipline plugin.

plugins.name: cc-enslaver
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.11 adds rule 08 (read-before-edit / think-before-write) + rule 09 (systematic modification, no patch-style) with PreToolUse new_string patch-marker interception and two new Stop-hook layers (e + f) scoped to edit turns.
